description: A/B test variations for main CTA button and headline

variations.name: Current - Hardware Bound
variations.headline: The AI Shell That Survives OS Reinstalls
variations.subtitle: NeuralShell is a local-first operator shell for paranoid developers...

variations.name: Privacy Focus
variations.headline: AI That Never Phones Home
variations.subtitle: Your code, your conversations, your data. NeuralShell runs 100% locally with cryptographic hardware binding.

variations.name: Security Professional
variations.headline: The Air-Gapped AI Shell
variations.subtitle: SOC2-ready audit trails. Hardware-bound sessions. Works completely offline. Built for security teams.

variations.name: Technical Proof
variations.headline: Cryptographically Bound to Your Hardware
variations.subtitle: Sessions encrypted with CPU+BIOS+UUID fingerprint. Survive OS reinstalls. Won't work on other machines.

variations.name: Competitive
variations.headline: Cursor Alternative That Doesn't Trust the Cloud
variations.subtitle: Same AI power. None of the privacy risk. Local-first, hardware-bound, audit-ready.
